title: cola micrantha
intro: Cola micrantha is a tropical plant species native to West Africa, belonging to the family Sterculiaceae, and is commonly known as the 'Cola nut tree'. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects, which are derived from its seeds. The health benefits of Cola micrantha include relief from headaches, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as being used to treat digestive problems and promote oral health. Herbal preparations of Cola micrantha include teas, infusions, and extracts that are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
